creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
RKWard prior to v. 0.5 depends on KDE-3, and newer versions
	depend on KDE-4.

	Please repocopy math/rkward to math/rkward-kde4 and assign this
	PR back to me.

Fix: When the repocopy will be completed, I shall apply the hereunder
	patch:
How-To-Repeat: 	Perform the repocopy.
